allow: Bash(python -c "from api.config import settings; print\('Config OK'\); print\(f'  App ID: {settings.github_app_id}'\); print\(f'  PEM path: {settings.github_private_key_path}'\); print\(f'  Adapter: {settings.adapter_path}'\)")
Bash(python -c "from api.config import settings; key = settings.github_private_key; print\(f'PEM loaded: {key[:30]}...'\); print\(f'PEM length: {len\(key\)} chars'\)")
